styleGuide.name: Ledger editorial
styleGuide.description: PayeTax blog images should feel like calm UK tax explainers built from paper, forms, calendars, calculators, and restrained editorial still-life composition.

background.base: warm paper or off-white desk surface
background.texture: subtle paper grain, faint ledger grid, ruled document lines, or calculator tape

styleGuide.illustrationStyle: realistic or lightly dimensional editorial still life, not glossy fintech illustration
styleGuide.lighting: clean daylight, low contrast, soft natural shadows, no glow
allowedObjects: calendar with abstract marker but no readable date text
neatly stacked banknotes without readable markings
avoid: titles or labels in the image
styleGuide.notes: The website supplies article titles and metadata. Images should support the subject without making factual, legal, or tax claims.

globalPromptSuffix: Warm paper desk, faint ledger grid, realistic documents, calculator, restrained ink-blue accents, clean daylight, low contrast, 16:10 editorial still life. No text, no labels, no logos, no fake HMRC branding, no official crests, no digital dashboard, no glow.

salary-guides.prompt: Editorial still life of a payslip, calculator tape, neatly separated pound coins, and a simple budget sheet on warm paper. Faint ledger grid in the background. Ink-blue and muted-gold accents.

tax-basics.prompt: Clean UK tax explainer scene with blank forms, ruled paper, a calculator, and a pen arranged like a broadsheet still life. Public-authority tone, warm paper, restrained ink-blue accents.

tax-tips.prompt: Practical tax tips scene with a payslip, checklist-style blank paper, calculator, and small stacks of pound coins. Warm paper surface, restrained ink-blue and muted-green accents.

tax-planning.prompt: Tax-planning scene with pension papers, envelopes, calculator tape, ledger notebook, and neatly arranged coins. Warm paper, muted-green and ink-blue accents, calm editorial composition.

tax-changes.prompt: Budget or tax-change scene with official-looking blank papers, a small desk calendar marker, calculator, coins, and a folder. Muted-red or muted-gold attention accent, warm paper, no branding.

tax-comparison.prompt: Comparison scene with two neat stacks of blank tax papers, side-by-side calculator tape, coins, and ruled ledger paper. Balanced composition, warm paper, ink-blue accents.

student-loans.prompt: Student loan repayment scene with a payslip, graduation-cap-shaped paperweight, calculator, stacked documents, and pound coins. Calm explanatory tone, paper background, ink-blue and muted-green accents.

tax-deadlines.prompt: Tax deadline scene with a desk calendar, blank forms, plain envelope, calculator, and binder clips on warm paper. Muted-gold attention accent, clean paper-led layout.

postPromptRecipe: Start with the category prompt matching the MDX category.
Add 2 to 4 topicObjectHints if they fit the post.
Add the globalPromptSuffix exactly or near-exactly.
Keep the prompt factual and visual. Do not ask the image to show rates, dates, thresholds, titles, or official logos.

altTextRecipe.format: Literal description of the image contents, under about 140 characters.
goodExamples: Tax forms, calendar, calculator, and coins arranged on a warm paper desk
Payslip, calculator tape, and pound coins on ruled paper
Blank company accounts papers, dividend notes, and calculator on a desk

filenameRules.shape: short descriptive kebab-case matching the post topic

batchRefreshRules: Refresh images in small visual batches rather than regenerating the whole library at once.
Keep filenames stable unless the old name is misleading or shared.
Inspect generated images before import and final jpgs after import.
Commit image refreshes separately from content rewrites.
